benchmark_details.name: Reefknot: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Relation Hallucination Evaluation, Analysis and Mitigation in Multimodal Large Language Models
benchmark_details.overview: Reefknot is a comprehensive benchmark targeting relation hallucinations in multimodal large language models, comprising over 20,000 real-world samples with two types of relationships and three evaluation tasks to assess relation hallucinations comprehensively.

purpose_and_intended_users.goal: To evaluate and mitigate relation hallucinations in multimodal large language models.

methodology.calculation: Rscore is calculated as the average of (1 minus hallucination rate) across three tasks.
methodology.interpretation: Lower hallucination rates indicate better performance.
methodology.validation: Multi-turn manual verification by domain experts.
